mapper.sql: SELECT (${rn_top} / (${rn_top} - ${rn_bottom})) AS pageNo , (${rn_top} - ${rn_bottom}) AS pageSize , totalCount - (rowindx - 1) AS rrowindx , ROW_.* FROM (

SELECT a.rownum_ AS rowindx , b.TOTAL_COUNT AS totalCount , a.BOARD_CD AS boardCd , a.BOARD_KOR_NM AS boardKorNm , a.NTI_YN AS ntiYn , a.RCMD_YN AS rcmdYn , a.CONTENT_EDITOR_YN AS contentEditorYn , a.ATTCH_FILE_YN AS attchFileYn , a.FILE_LIMIT_CNT AS fileLimitCnt , a.FILE_LIMIT_MB AS fileLimitMb , a.SECRET_YN AS secretYn , a.REPLY_YN AS replyYn , a.USE_YN AS useYn , a.REG_DATE AS regDate FROM ( SELECT (@rownum := @rownum + 1) AS rownum_ , BOARD_CD , BOARD_KOR_NM , NTI_YN , RCMD_YN , CONTENT_EDITOR_YN , ATTCH_FILE_YN , FILE_LIMIT_CNT , FILE_LIMIT_MB , SECRET_YN , REPLY_YN , USE_YN , DATE_FORMAT(REG_DATE, '%Y.%m.%d') as REG_DATE FROM STB_SM_BOARDTYPE_MNG JOIN (SELECT @rownum := 0) r WHERE 1 = 1
AND BOARD_CD LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyWord},'%')
AND BOARD_KOR_NM LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyWord},'%')
AND ( BOARD_CD LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyWord},'%') OR BOARD_KOR_NM LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyWord},'%') )
ORDER BY REG_DATE ASC ) a JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_COUNT FROM STB_SM_BOARDTYPE_MNG WHERE 1 = 1
AND BOARD_CD LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyWord},'%')
AND BOARD_KOR_NM LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyWord},'%')
AND ( BOARD_CD LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyWord},'%') OR BOARD_KOR_NM LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyWord},'%') )
) b ON 1 = 1
mapper.select: /* on.standard.system.boardtype.inqBoardInfo */ SELECT BOARD_CD AS boardCd , FN_S_COM_CD_INFO('COM_USE_YN',USE_YN,'FILTER_1') AS useYn , BOARD_KOR_NM AS boardKorNm , BOARD_ENG_NM AS boardEngNm , BOARD_COMMENT AS boardComment , FN_S_COM_CD_INFO('COM_USE_YN',NTI_YN,'FILTER_1') AS ntiYn , FN_S_COM_CD_INFO('COM_USE_YN',RCMD_YN,'FILTER_1') AS rcmdYn , FN_S_COM_CD_INFO('COM_USE_YN',TITLE_YN,'FILTER_1') AS titleYn , FN_S_COM_CD_INFO('COM_USE_YN',CONTENT_YN,'FILTER_1') AS contentYn , FN_S_COM_CD_INFO('COM_USE_YN',CONTENT_EDITOR_YN ,'FILTER_1') AS contentEditorYn , FN_S_COM_CD_INFO('COM_USE_YN',ATTCH_FILE_YN ,'FILTER_1') AS attchFileYn , FILE_LIMIT_CNT AS fileLimitCnt , FILE_LIMIT_MB AS fileLimitMb , FN_S_COM_CD_INFO('COM_USE_YN',SECRET_YN,'FILTER_1') AS secretYn , FN_S_COM_CD_INFO('COM_USE_YN',REPLY_YN,'FILTER_1') AS replyYn , TEMPCOL_1 AS tempCol1 , TEMPCOL_2 AS tempCol2 , TEMPCOL_3 AS tempCol3 , TEMPCOL_4 AS tempCol4 , TEMPCOL_5 AS tempCol5 , TEMPCOL_6 AS tempCol6 , REG_USER AS regUser , DATE_FORMAT(REG_DATE, '%Y.%m.%d') AS regDate FROM STB_SM_BOARDTYPE_MNG WHERE BOARD_CD = #{boardCd}

/* on.standard.system.boardtype.inqBoardTypeDetail */ SELECT BOARD_CD AS boardCd , USE_YN AS useYn , BOARD_KOR_NM AS boardKorNm , BOARD_ENG_NM AS boardEngNm , BOARD_COMMENT AS boardComment , NTI_YN AS ntiYn , RCMD_YN AS rcmdYn , TITLE_YN AS titleYn , CONTENT_YN AS contentYn , CONTENT_EDITOR_YN AS contentEditorYn , ATTCH_FILE_YN AS attchFileYn , FILE_LIMIT_CNT AS fileLimitCnt , FILE_LIMIT_MB AS fileLimitMb , SECRET_YN AS secretYn , REPLY_YN AS replyYn , TEMPCOL_1 AS tempCol1 , TEMPCOL_2 AS tempCol2 , TEMPCOL_3 AS tempCol3 , TEMPCOL_4 AS tempCol4 , TEMPCOL_5 AS tempCol5 , TEMPCOL_6 AS tempCol6 , REG_USER AS regUser , DATE_FORMAT(REG_DATE, '%Y.%m.%d') AS regDate FROM STB_SM_BOARDTYPE_MNG WHERE BOARD_CD = #{menuFuncCd}
